PARAM.description: the supplied RandomGenerator must not be null
PARAM.name: randomGenerator

PARAM.description: the code must be an instance of RandomGenerator
PARAM.name: randomGenerator

RETURN.description: a Random instance wrapping the RandomGenerator

RETURN.description: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed boolean value from this random number generator's sequence.
RETURN.content: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed boolean value from this random number generator's sequence.

PARAM.description: the byte array must not be null
PARAM.name: bytes
PARAM.content: the non-null byte array in which to put the random bytes

RETURN.description: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed double value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence.
RETURN.content: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed double value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence.

RETURN.description: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed float value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence.
RETURN.content: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed float value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence.
the next pseudorandom, Gaussian ("normally") distributed double value with mean 0.0 and standard deviation 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence
RETURN.description: the next pseudorandom, Gaussian ("normally") distributed double value with mean 0.0 and standard deviation 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence

RETURN.content: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value from this random number generator's sequence
RETURN.description: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value from this random number generator's sequence

PARAM.name: n
PARAM.content: the bound on the random number to be returned. Must be positive.

RETURN.description: a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value between 0 (inclusive) and n (exclusive).
RETURN.content: a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value between 0 (inclusive) and n (exclusive).
